'''âz-j-h-d''' ('''kazajhedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hoist|hoist]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-j-h-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hoist|hoist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-j-h-d
|-
! Lemma
| kazajhedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizajhedoko|thizajhedoko]] || [[word:jizajhedoko|jizajhedoko]] || [[word:shizajhedoko|shizajhedoko]] || [[word:kizajhedoko|kizajhedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzajhedoko|thuthuzajhedoko]] || [[word:jujuzajhedoko|jujuzajhedoko]] || [[word:shushuzajhedoko|shushuzajhedoko]] || [[word:kukuzajhedoko|kukuzajhedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozajhedoko|thozajhedoko]] || [[word:jozajhedoko|jozajhedoko]] || [[word:shozajhedoko|shozajhedoko]] || [[word:kozajhedoko|kozajhedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzajhedoko|thĂŠzajhedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠzajhedoko|jĂŠzajhedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠzajhedoko|shĂŠzajhedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠzajhedoko|kĂŠzajhedoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazajhedoko|thazajhedoko]] || [[word:jazajhedoko|jazajhedoko]] || [[word:shazajhedoko|shazajhedoko]] || [[word:kazajhedoko|kazajhedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
